Log:
  The UniFi Controller allows you to manage Wireless, Routing & Switching,
  VoIP and Video of Ubiquiti Networks.

  This port tracks the development releases.

  WWW: http://wiki.ubnt.com/UniFi_FAQ

  PR:	223401
